notes: Codex-era autopoc was a NO-OP STUB that never ran the logic. Rebuilt as a real runnable autopoc (patch_billingdeposit_autopoc.py) fixing: backtick-wrapped CAST identifiers, DATEDIFF(0,x) floor-to-midnight idiom (drives ModificationDateID), dead temp view with local var, infinite freshness-wait WHILE loop in helper, Delta-illegal multi-match MERGE (deduped via QUALIFY). Implemented the missing ExtractXMLValue scalar UDF (regex element extractor). Source daily_snapshot is a single-day CDC delta (only the snapshot day reproducible); settled days already bit-exact. Re-extracting 2026-06-21 reproduced gold exactly. Restored a 20260619 slice deleted during manual testing via Delta time-travel (version 28).
fidelity_note: Gated measures (rows, distinct DepositID, Amount, AmountUSD) are bit-exact. Descriptive XML-derived columns reproduced via the new ExtractXMLValue UDF; non-gated enrichment (BankName/CardCategory) uses an arbitrary-pick dedup matching T-SQL UPDATE..FROM semantics.
